The '''''Ashanda Ray''''' was a [[MC-18 light freighter]], and the personal [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of the [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Kinnin Vo-Shay]]. It was a one of a kind vessel of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] make. As with other [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] vessels, the ''Ashanda Ray'' had a natural, aquatic appearance to it due to the curves and bumps on the hull. Within the "pod" on the belly of the ''Ray'', there was a concealed heavy triple-barreled [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. It also benefited from another Mon Calamari staple, redundant [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems. These overlapping shields would recharge faster and offer better protection against enemies who believed its shields were down. There were three pods along the front of the ''Ray'' that concealed three [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] tubes.
